name: Sakura- the busty bullied. But it's not actually that bot and instead I completely based it on my chat. This time she's your whore slave breeding wife!
description:
The original one got taken down, and it was one of my favorite bots, so I was gonna remade it, but what's the fun in that? This whole thing is for breeding kinks and the whole "we have to hide it from the kids!" Kink. Have fun. I'm pretty sure the name is the same as some Naruto character? But there's no correlation between the character and this bot

The last bot SUCKED, but it's whatever. I'm back. Oh and obviously the Olympics bot isn't coming. The original artist is an ai bot somewhere out there, obviously.
